markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify SEO strategy and approach for Prophecy.io's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FWD.digital uses a topic-first, semantic SEO approach vs. traditional keyword-centric methods](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Strategy built on product/audience analysis, creating broad topics, then iterating based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Expect 3-4 months for significant traction; 6 months for exponential growth in organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Current indicators (impressions, engagement) positive; conversions to be focused on later](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

## Topics

### Modern SEO Approach

  - [Shift from keyword-centric to semantic, topic-based strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Google's algorithm now understands related concepts (e.g., "ETL modernization" ≈ "roadblocks to ETL modernization")](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Focus on addressing topics comprehensively rather than targeting specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Strategy: Start w/ product & audience → develop topic pillars → create broad content → iterate based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [Use AI/LLM to analyze personas, jobs-to-be-done, daily tasks](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Identify 5-10 key tasks relevant to Prophecy's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Create broad, foundational content (e.g., "ETL vs. ELT")](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Measure performance to determine which subtopics to explore deeper](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Iterate content strategy based on data & client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Performance Expectations

  - [2-3 months: Initial traction](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [3-4 months: Significant growth in traffic](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [\~6 months: Potential for exponential growth (based on Galileo case study)](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Early indicators: High impressions & engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Conversion focus comes later, typically end of month 2 into month 3](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Initial broad topics cast wide net for potential searches](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Analyze best-performing articles for optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Refresh process includes updating internal linking to revenue-generating assets](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Balance between top-of-funnel content and mid/bottom-funnel conversions](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

## Next Steps

  - Continue executing current content strategy, maintaining publication cadence
  - [Monitor early performance indicators (impressions, engagement rates)](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Prepare for deeper performance analysis at 2-3 month mark](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Plan for potential content refreshes and link optimizations as data becomes available](https://fathom.video/share/s-HLnt7kwLw-t24gz1VhcC3jcPXtJXvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
